header.title: PDF Splitter — Split PDF into Multiple Files Online
header.description: Free online PDF splitter to divide PDF into multiple files. Split by every page, fixed page chunks, or custom page ranges. Extract specific pages and create separate PDFs in seconds — 100% client-side, nothing is uploaded.
header.keywords: pdf splitter, split pdf, separate pdf pages, extract pdf pages, pdf divider, split pdf into multiple files, pdf page extractor, free pdf splitter

privacy.notice: 100% client-side. Your PDF is processed entirely in the browser — nothing is uploaded to any server.

pageRanges.title: Page Ranges
pageRanges.addRangeEmpty: Add a range to split into

empty.addFile: Add a PDF file to start splitting

howToUse.title: How to Use PDF Splitter
howToUse.step1Desc: Drop or upload the PDF file you want to split.
howToUse.step2Desc: Select 'Every Page', 'Fixed Chunks', or 'Custom Ranges' depending on how you want to divide the PDF.
howToUse.step3Desc: For chunks, set pages per group. For custom ranges, define each page group with labels.
howToUse.step4Desc: Click 'Split' and download individual PDFs or a ZIP archive — no uploads, 100% private.

items.question: What split modes are available?
items.answer: Three modes: 'Every Page' creates one PDF per page, 'Fixed Chunks' splits by every N pages, and 'Custom Ranges' lets you define page groups manually.

items.question: How do I use custom ranges?
items.answer: Enter page ranges like '1-3' or '1-3, 5' and give each group a label. Use Quick Add for first half, second half, odd pages, or even pages.

items.question: What is the maximum PDF size I can split?
items.answer: Files up to 100 MB typically work well. Since processing is client-side, very large files may be limited by browser memory.

items.question: Can I split a password-protected PDF?
items.answer: No. Remove the password first using the Unlock PDF tool before splitting.

items.question: How are the output files named?
items.answer: Files are named using your prefix (default 'split') followed by a number or your custom range label, e.g., 'split-1.pdf', 'split-2.pdf'.

items.question: Can I download all split files at once?
items.answer: Yes. Use 'Download all as ZIP' to get a single archive containing all split PDFs, or download them individually.
